invocations.name: Agonizing Blast
invocations.summary: Choose one Warlock cantrip that deals damage. Add your Charisma modifier to that spell's damage rolls.

invocations.name: Armor of Shadows
invocations.summary: You can cast Mage Armor on yourself without expending a spell slot.

invocations.name: Devil's Sight
invocations.summary: You can see normally in Dim Light and Darkness, both magical and nonmagical.

invocations.name: Eldritch Mind
invocations.summary: You have Advantage on Constitution saving throws made to maintain Concentration.

invocations.name: Fiendish Vigor
invocations.summary: You can give yourself Temporary Hit Points through fiendish magic.

invocations.name: Mask of Many Faces
invocations.summary: You can disguise yourself with magic without expending a spell slot.

invocations.name: Misty Visions
invocations.summary: You can cast Silent Image without expending a spell slot.

invocations.name: Pact of the Blade
invocations.summary: You gain a pact weapon option that lets you fight using Warlock magic.

invocations.name: Pact of the Chain
invocations.summary: You gain a magically improved familiar option tied to your pact.

invocations.name: Pact of the Tome
invocations.summary: You gain a grimoire that expands your magical options.

invocations.name: Repelling Blast
invocations.summary: When you hit a Large or smaller creature with the chosen cantrip, you can push it up to 10 feet away.
